steps.title: Identify the multiplier
steps.content: The equation $d=15t$ gives distance in terms of time. The coefficient of $t$ is the constant rate of change.

steps.title: Apply the units
steps.content: The coefficient is $15$. Since distance is measured in inches and time is measured in seconds, the rate is $15$ inches per second.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing $y=15x$ shows a line with slope $15$, so the matching rate is $15$ inches per second. The answer is B.
